title: neottia autumnalis
intro: Neottia autumnalis, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it useful for treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of Neottia autumnalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
